assets.name: Rank E - Seeker
assets.prompt: A sharp, weathered grey metal letter 'E', encased in a faint glowing 8-point Islamic star, Anime style, sharp edges, dark cinematic lighting, Void Black background (#0B0B0F), center composition, high focus, subtle blue sparks, dusty atmosphere.

assets.name: Rank D - Striver
assets.prompt: A polished steel letter 'D' with glowing blue inner light, mounted on a geometric Islamic star frame, Anime style with metallic textures, Monarch Blue glow (#3B82F6), front view, cinematic depth of field, blue lightning particles, disciplined mood.

assets.name: Rank C - Disciplined
assets.prompt: A solid bronze letter 'C' with pulsating Monarch Blue energy, integrated into a complex 8-point Girih pattern, Anime style with heavy metallic detail, Bronze and Monarch Blue palette, centered, isometric perspective, glowing geometric ley lines, high energy.

assets.name: Rank B - Scholar
assets.prompt: An elegant silver-etched letter 'B' with gold filigree, surrounded by a radiant 8-point Islamic geometric aura, Anime style with divine glow, Silver and Khalifa Gold (#EAB308) and Monarch Blue, 45-degree angle, sharp focus, floating geometric shards, noble atmosphere.

assets.name: Rank A - Guide
assets.prompt: A majestic glowing golden letter 'A' with intricate Kufic calligraphy etchings, floating inside a massive indigo-light 8-point star, Anime style with high-end digital gloss, Khalifa Gold and Shadow Purple (#7C3AED), front perspective, wide angle focus, radiant divine light beams, powerful presence.

assets.name: Rank S - Monarch
assets.prompt: A flaming indigo and gold letter 'S', pulsing with 'Divine Radiance' energy, set against an exploding geometric mandala of 8-point stars, Anime style with epic power-up effects, Monarch Blue and Khalifa Gold and Shadow Purple, center focus, cinematic explosion, swirling energy particles, monarchic dominance.

assets.name: Pillar - Deen
assets.prompt: The 'Gate of Tauheed': A massive stone Islamic archway with glowing blue Kufic engravings, radiating intense light from the center, Anime style with stone texture and magical lighting, Monarch Blue and Amber Light (#F59E0B), eye-level perspective, dramatic lighting, floating geometric dust, sacred mood.

assets.name: Pillar - Body
assets.prompt: The 'Forge of the Nafs': A heavy steel hammer striking a red-hot glowing anvil, blue sparks flying out in the shape of 8-point geometric stars, Anime style with forge heat effects, Steel Grey (#4B5563) and Monarch Blue and Amber-Red, close-up shot, motion blur on hammer, heat distortion, gritty atmosphere.

assets.name: Pillar - Money
assets.prompt: The 'Scales of Justice': Digital gold scales balanced on a Kufic-style pedestal, glowing with Khalifa Gold energy, surrounded by floating geometric coins, Anime style with hologram effects, Khalifa Gold and Void Black, isometric view, sharp digital lines, data-stream particles, disciplined wealth.

assets.name: Character - The Seeker
assets.prompt: A mysterious hooded apprentice in shadowy dark grey robes, face hidden in deep shadow, standing in a void, Anime style with heavy shadows and sharp highlights, Void Black and Steel Grey, full body medium shot, low angle, subtle blue wisps of shadow, humble beginning.

assets.name: Character - The Guardian
assets.prompt: A disciplined warrior in sleek modern armor with glowing blue runes and Kufic engravings, holding a shadowy translucent blade, Anime style with intricate armor detail, Monarch Blue and Steel Grey, 3/4 view, heroic pose, blue lightning aura, sharp focus.

assets.name: Character - The Khalifa
assets.prompt: A majestic monarch figure in ornate indigo and gold armor, a cape made of pure light, standing in a radiant Majlis hall, Anime style with divine lighting, Khalifa Gold and Shadow Purple and Monarch Blue, wide shot, center composition, divine radiance, gold-flecked particles, noble authority.

assets.name: Legion Shadow - Warrior
assets.prompt: A dark indigo silhouette of a mujahid warrior with sharp glowing blue eyes, edges dissolving into electric energy, Anime 'Shadow Extraction' style, Shadow Purple and Monarch Blue, action pose, side profile, electric energy arcs, intimidating presence.

assets.name: Legion Shadow - Scholar
assets.prompt: A purple-hued silhouette of a robed scholar figure holding a glowing digital scroll, floating in the void with geometric stars, Anime style with translucent energy, Shadow Purple and Khalifa Gold, meditative pose, top-down perspective, floating knowledge particles, mystical mood.

assets.name: Texture - Void Forge
assets.prompt: Deep matte black surface with micro-crystalline blue sparks and faint etched 8-point star patterns in the distance, Cinematic texture, Void Black and Monarch Blue, flat lay macro, shallow depth of field, subtle blue glow, focused atmosphere.

assets.name: Texture - Divine Majlis
assets.prompt: Dark translucent panels with layered gold geometric patterns and floating amber particles in a deep indigo space, Cinematic atmosphere, Shadow Purple and Khalifa Gold, wide perspective, soft bokeh, gold-flecked radiance, noble depth.
